items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 1 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「Reducing High-Bandwidth Memory Bottlenecks in JAX-Based LLM Training with Host Offloading」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
actionItems: 评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：Reducing High-Bandwidth Memory Bottlenecks in JAX-Based LLM Training with Host Offloading
watchItems: 跟进：Reducing High-Bandwidth Memory Bottlenecks in JAX-Based LLM Training with Host Offloading

items.title: Reducing High-Bandwidth Memory Bottlenecks in JAX-Based LLM Training with Host Offloading
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：Large language model (LLM) training workloads increasingly run into GPU memory limits before compute is fully used. Model weights, gradients, optimizer states,...
items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。
